name: NB-001
description: NB-001 has been investigated for the treatment of Recurrent Herpes Labialis.
mechanismOfAction: NB-001 is developed by NanoBio with an additional pharmaceutical treatments utilizing the NanoStat antimicrobial technology for fungal, viral and bacterial infections of the skin and mucous membranes. In addition to *Herpes labialis*, clinical trials has begun with NanoTxt, which is a topical treatment for nail fungus (onychomycosis). NanoBio's product has the potential to be the first topical treatment for nail fungus with efficacy similar to systemic medications.
